creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
Hm,

for 8.x users the port is now broken because
files/extra-patch-plugins__check_users.c does not apply clean

> /usr/ports/net-mgmt/nagios-plugins # uname -pr
8.4-RELEASE-p4 amd64


> /usr/ports/net-mgmt/nagios-plugins # make patch
...
===>  Patching for nagios-plugins-1.5,1
===>  Applying extra patch /usr/svn_ports/net-mgmt/nagios-plugins/files/extra-patch-plugins__check_users.c
3 out of 3 hunks failed--saving rejects to plugins/check_users.c.rej
*** Error code 3

Stop in /usr/svn_ports/net-mgmt/nagios-plugins.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/svn_ports/net-mgmt/nagios-plugins.
